sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Heico Earns Equal Weight Rating from Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Heico (NYSE:HEI) with an "equal weight" rating and a $290 price target. This rating reflects the firm's acknowledgment of Heico's strong market position and diverse product offerings in the aerospace sector, but also indicates limited near-term upside due to valuation concerns. Heico is a major supplier of replacement parts and services for the aviation, military, and space industries.

feed.title: Proxy adviser ISS recommends vote against BP board over attempt to scrap some climate reporting
feed.summary: Influential proxy adviser ISS has recommended shareholders vote against BP's board over its proposal to revoke previous climate reporting resolutions from 2015 and 2019. ISS stated that BP's argument for retiring these resolutions, which passed with near 100% support, was not compelling enough to offset concerns. The adviser also opposed BP's plan to hold online-only shareholder meetings.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley’s defensive playbook for spiking oil prices amid Iran war - CNBC TV18
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley strategists are advising investors to prepare their portfolios for potential volatility due to uncertain energy supplies, especially with spiking oil prices amid the Iran war. CNBC-TV18 highlights this market wisdom, suggesting defensive plays are crucial in such an environment. The article points to insights available through CNBCTV18Access for more detailed analysis.

feed.title: Maplebear (CART) Is Up 8.5% After Exclusive ALDI Fulfillment Deal Deepens Instacart Partnership
feed.summary: Maplebear (Instacart) stock is up 8.5% after ALDI U.S. cemented Instacart as its exclusive fulfillment partner nationwide through its Storefront Pro platform. This deepened partnership integrates Instacart's AI-driven discovery and e-commerce tools, reinforcing Instacart's role as a technology backbone for large grocery retailers. While the deal strengthens Instacart's enterprise partnership strategy, investors are still cautioned to consider potential risks such as rising labor costs and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Says Bitcoin Bottom Is Near. Is It Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Bitcoin has seen a 45% drop from last year's high, but Goldman Sachs suggests the crypto may have reached its bottom due to increasing institutional investment and decreasing liquidations.
